description: When the capture service throws, the user sees an error toast and the input is preserved
preconditions: Capture service induced to throw — best-effort against live system; spec marked skipped if service is healthy
steps: Type 'foo' into the AppBar quick-capture field
expected: Snackbar shows 'Capture failed: ...' OR 'Captured ✓' (live system, can't force the failure path)
